title: Deno Deploy now powers 10% of serverless traffic — the edge runtime inflection point
snippet: Deno Deploy's growth is staggering. Edge runtimes are winning because they eliminate the regional latency problem. The V8 isolate model is proving itself at scale.
author: hn_user_edgefan

title: Why we moved from AWS Lambda to Cloudflare Workers: a performance post-mortem
snippet: p99 latency fell from 450ms to 18ms after migrating to Cloudflare Workers. The edge runtime model is not just hype—it fundamentally changes what's possible.
author: hn_user_infra_nerd
